---
title: "Contents"
subtitle: "Full-site contents listing"
date: today
listing:
  contents:
    - "pages/*.qmd"
    - "posts/*.qmd"
    - "galleries/*.qmd"
    - "about/*.qmd"
    - "learnr/*.qmd"
    - "presentations/*.qmd"
    - "senpep-posts/*.qmd"
    - "*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date-modified, date, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  filter-ui: [date-modified, date, title]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Published"
    date-modified: "Edited"
    title: "Title"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  feed:
    title: "All New Content" 
    type: "partial"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
